title: Simple Skins
description: Basic skin functionality without having millions of commands. Perfect for offline servers aligned with bedrock geyser!
body:
# Simple Skins - Compatible with Bedrock & Java

# Commands:
- **/skinset** **<**Premium Minecraft username**>** (Can be obtained from namemc.com).
- **/viewskin** (Shows a list of preconfigured skins to pick from, some may not work)

## Example Command Usage:
- **/skinset Notch**
- **/viewskins**

# Reason for creating:
My server NormalSurvival is an offline java/bedrock server. Skinrestorer is quite awful when it comes to bedrock and you can't install floodgate to keep offline. So with my plugin you can change your skin however you want, java and bedrock included!

# The Plugin:
Set skins will be saved, and applied everytime a user joins. They are also cached in case the premium account changed their skin.
